_comment: Starlight Void (星辉虚空) — the default biome of the Starry Sky dimension's inter-planetary space. Canon: the vast darkness between cultivation planets in the Alliance Star System. Dark sky (color 0 — pure black, full night). No precipitation (vacuum). No creatures spawn via vanilla — the dangers here are simulated void beasts, not vanilla mobs. The ground consists of sparse end_stone asteroids (floating islands from the_end noise settings). Features: very sparse — just floating end_stone fragments. Mobs: empty (the simulation handles NPC cultivators and void beasts). Category: THEEND.
